title: monardella breweri subsp. lanceolata
intro: Monardella breweri subsp. lanceolata, also known as Brewer's Sage or Purple Sage, is a subspecies of the Monardella breweri plant, a flowering herb native to the western United States. This plant has been used in herbal medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Monardella breweri subsp. lanceolata include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and alleviating symptoms of colds and flu. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional medicine to enhance its therapeutic effects.
